title: NVIDIA’s first GeForce driver for Windows on Arm confirms RTX Spark N1X with 6,144 or 5,120 CUDA cores
excerpt: GeForce 616.00 is NVIDIA’s first native Arm64 graphics driver for Windows 11. The developer package currently supports Microsoft’s Surface RTX Spark Dev Box.
content_html:
Published: Jul 21, 2026, 18:19 GMT WhyCry

NVIDIA GeForce 616.00 adds native Windows 11 on Arm support for RTX Spark

NVIDIA has published its first native GeForce graphics driver for Windows 11 on Arm. GeForce 616.00 is labeled as a Developer Preview and currently targets Microsoft’s Surface RTX Spark Dev Box rather than consumer laptops. The driver was included in recent NVIDIA developer forum post. This is therefore not an OEM driver copied from an unreleased laptop. 

What’s inside

The Arm64 installation package contains a file named nv_surface_woa.inf. This file lists supported hardware identifiers and confirms two RTX Spark N1X graphics configurations. One uses a Blackwell GPU with 6,144 CUDA cores, while the second has 5,120 CUDA cores.

These specifications match the N1X 675 and N1X 650 configurations previously reported by VideoCardz. The full version combines 20 Arm CPU cores with 48 Streaming Multiprocessors. The smaller model uses an 18-core CPU and 40 SMs. Both configurations support up to 128GB of LPDDR5X unified memory.

The package also lists an unnamed “NVIDIA Desktop Device” and several NVIDIA NPU identifiers based on the company’s Deep Learning Accelerator architecture. The desktop entry may be associated with the Surface RTX Spark Dev Box or another compact RTX Spark system, but the driver does not identify the product.

Microsoft introduced the Surface RTX Spark Dev Box in June. It is a compact development system with 128GB of unified memory and a 100W power envelope. NVIDIA and its partners are also preparing RTX Spark laptops, including the Surface Laptop Ultra and Lenovo Yoga Pro 9n.

GeForce 616.00 remains a development driver without WHQL certification. Consumer RTX Spark systems will require later drivers with broader device support before they begin shipping.

content_html_zh:
发布时间： 2026 年 7 月 21 日 18:19 GMT WhyCry

NVIDIA GeForce 616.00 增加了对 RTX Spark 的原生 Windows 11 on Arm 支持

NVIDIA 发布了首款适用于 Arm 上 Windows 11 的原生 GeForce 显卡驱动程序。 GeForce 616.00 被标记为开发者预览版，目前针对的是 Microsoft 的 Surface RTX Spark Dev Box，而不是消费类笔记本电脑。 该驱动程序包含在最近的 NVIDIA 开发者论坛帖子中。 因此，这不是从未发布的笔记本电脑复制的 OEM 驱动程序。

里面有什么

Arm64安装包包含一个名为nv_surface_woa.inf的文件。 该文件列出了支持的硬件标识符并确认了两种 RTX Spark N1X 显卡配置。 其中一个使用具有 6,144 个 CUDA 核心的 Blackwell GPU，而第二个则拥有 5,120 个 CUDA 核心。

这些规格与 VideoCardz 之前报道的 N1X 675 和 N1X 650 配置相匹配。 完整版本结合了 20 个 Arm CPU 内核和 48 个流多处理器。 较小的型号使用 18 核 CPU 和 40 个 SM。 两种配置均支持高达 128GB 的​​ LPDDR5X 统一内存。

该软件包还列出了一个未命名的“NVIDIA 桌面设备”和几个基于该公司深度学习加速器架构的 NVIDIA NPU 标识符。 桌面条目可能与 Surface RTX Spark Dev Box 或其他紧凑型 RTX Spark 系统相关联，但驱动程序无法识别该产品。

微软于 6 月推出了 Surface RTX Spark Dev Box。 它是一个紧凑的开发系统，具有 128GB 统一内存和 100W 功率范围。 NVIDIA 及其合作伙伴还准备了 RTX Spark 笔记本电脑，包括 Surface Laptop Ultra 和联想 Yoga Pro 9n。

GeForce 616.00 仍然是一个没有 WHQL 认证的开发驱动程序。 消费者 RTX Spark 系统在开始发货之前将需要具有更广泛设备支持的更高版本的驱动程序。
